agents.toolDescriptions.Bash: Run a shell command and return stdout/stderr
agents.toolDescriptions.Read: Read a file (with optional line range) or list a directory
agents.toolDescriptions.Write: Write a file (overwrites if it exists) and creates parent directories if needed
agents.toolDescriptions.Edit: Replace exact text in a file
agents.toolDescriptions.Glob: Match files under a directory using a glob pattern
agents.toolDescriptions.Grep: Search file contents with a Go regular expression
agents.toolDescriptions.Skill: Execute a skill within the main conversation
agents.toolDescriptions.MemoryAdd: Add an entry at a path
agents.toolDescriptions.MemoryGet: Get aggregated content for a path
agents.toolDescriptions.MemoryDelete: Delete all entries at a path
agents.toolDescriptions.WebFetch: Fetch raw content from a URL (HTML converted to Markdown)
agents.toolDescriptions.WebSearch: Search the web and return cleaned content from top results
